name: riteshchauhan-portfolio
description: Static portfolio site with build system for minification and bundling.

scripts.copy:assets: npx cpy index.html about.html achievements.html app-projects-updated.html app-projects.html awards.html career.html certification.html contact.html education.html resume.html projects.html web-projects.html index-new.html styles-new.css styles.css 1.jpeg 2.jpeg 3.jpeg icons dist/ --parents
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css && npm run copy:assets && npm run copy:images
